0.details:
We have been together for three years, growing through challenges, understanding, patience and laughter.
Our faith journey has been one of mutual respect and proof that love truly loves above all things
You have seen me at my worst and loved me harder than I asked for
I vow to protect the life we have built and nurture the love that holds us.
0.model_generation: From the moment our paths crossed three years ago, you’ve been my partner in every sense of the word. Together we’ve navigated challenges, deepened our understanding, practiced patience, and shared endless laughter. Our faith journey has been marked by mutual respect, a living testament that love truly loves above all things. You have seen me at my worst and loved me stronger than I ever asked for. Today, I promise to protect the life we have built, to nurture the love that holds us, and to stand by your side through every joy and trial. I pledge to honor you with honesty, support you with unwavering faith, and cherish you with all my heart. I will celebrate your victories, comfort you in sorrow, and grow with you in spirit. With gratitude and devotion, I give you my heart, my loyalty, and my soul, now and forever, with every breath I take.
0.final_version: From the moment our paths crossed three years ago, you’ve been my partner in every sense of the word. Together we’ve navigated challenges, deepened our understanding, practiced patience, and shared endless laughter. Our faith journey has been marked by mutual respect, a living testament that love truly loves above all things. You have seen me at my worst and loved me stronger than I ever asked for. Today, I promise to protect the life we have built, to nurture the love that holds us, and to stand by your side through every joy and trial. I pledge to honour you with honesty, support you with unwavering faith, and cherish you with all my heart. I will celebrate your victories, comfort you in sorrow, and grow with you in spirit. With gratitude and devotion, I give you my heart and my loyalty now and forever, with every breath I take, I will cherish you now and until death do us part.

1.details:
We have known each other since primary school; we went from trading lunchboxes and snacks to trading advice and secrets as growing adults.
Today isn't just about celebrating their coming of age but it's about honouring the journey it took to reach this point in her life, the joy, strength, tears and drive to grow and the love she brings into each individual's life she touches in a positive way.
1.model_generation: Today, as we celebrate this milestone birthday, I can’t help but look back at all the moments that shaped the incredible person you’ve become. From trading lunchboxes in primary school to sharing secrets through every twist and turn, our friendship has been the greatest gift. I’ve seen your fierce determination transform challenges into stepping stones, your laughter light up the darkest days, and your unwavering compassion lift everyone around you. You have grown into someone whose strength inspires, whose tears reveal courage, and whose dreams remind us all to reach higher. More than just a celebration of adulthood, today honors the journey—the late-night talks, the inside jokes, the quiet support when life got tough. Thank you for bringing kindness and joy into every life you touch. Here’s to the next chapter of endless adventures, unbreakable memories, and the boundless love you so freely share. Happy birthday.
1.final_version: Today, as we celebrate this milestone birthday, I can’t help but look back at all the moments that shaped the incredible person you’ve become. From trading lunchboxes in primary school to sharing secrets through every twist and turn, our friendship has been the greatest gift. I’ve seen your fierce determination transform challenges into stepping stones, your laughter light up the darkest days, and your unwavering compassion lift everyone around you. You have grown into someone whose strength inspires, whose tears reveal courage, and whose dreams remind us all to reach higher. More than just a celebration of adulthood, today honors the journey—the late-night talks, the inside jokes, the quiet support when life got tough. Thank you for bringing kindness and joy into every life you touch. Here’s to the next chapter of endless adventures, unbreakable memories, and the boundless love you so freely share with everyone even when you have non to give. Happy birthday.

2.details:
The deceased was someone I have known personally and I fell the blow I can't imagine what your family and close relatives must be feeling in this dark time.
He has a quiet strength never needing to be the loudest in the room to be heard but made sure everyone felt seen and valued, the first to offer help even when he had little to give but still gave.
I will miss his presence deeply, but I ask for everyone to carry his spirit in a way we live each day as a gentle reminder of his grace and kindness.
2.model_generation:
Dear Family,

I was devastated to learn of his passing and cannot imagine the depth of your grief. He carried a quiet strength, never needing to be the loudest in the room to be heard, yet always making sure everyone felt seen and valued. He was the first to offer help, even when his own resources were limited, and his generosity and kindness left a lasting impression on all who knew him.

I will miss his calming presence and encouragement beyond words. Though his loss leaves a profound void, his spirit endures in every act of compassion and grace we extend to one another. May we honor his memory by living each day with the same gentle strength and care he showed us.

Please accept my heartfelt condolences. I am here for you and hold you close in my thoughts.

With deepest sympathy and friendship,
2.final_version:
Dear Family,

I was devastated to learn of his passing and cannot imagine the depth of your grief. He carried a quiet strength, never needing to be the loudest in the room to be heard, yet always making sure everyone felt seen and valued. He was the first to offer help, even when his own resources were limited, and his generosity and kindness left a lasting impression on all who knew him.

I will miss his calming presence and encouragement beyond words. Though his loss leaves a profound void, his spirit endures in every act of compassion and grace we extend to one another. May we honor his memory by living each day with the same gentle strength and care he showed us.

Please accept my heartfelt condolences. I am here for you and hold you close in my thoughts and prayers may the lord carry you over this difficult moment of your lives

With deepest sympathy and friendship.

likert.edit_type_other: Added a few of my own words that i would include in a letter.

3.details:
Hey you, I hope you are well, guess what? I recently started a new job as a florist a flied of work I never expected to land in, surprising right? but I am surprisingly grounded and have met some incredible people in along the way.
I have been spending more time reflecting on myself and coming to a realisation that I can dwell on past mistakes even though they have shaped who I am today I just need to embrace myself and show myself a bit more grace.
3.model_generation:
Hey there,

I hope you’re doing well. Guess what? I recently started a new job as a florist, a field I never expected to land in, but it’s been surprisingly grounding and rewarding. Every day I get to work with beautiful blooms and meet incredible people who’ve already taught me so much about creativity and patience. It’s amazing how something so different from my past experiences feels like the perfect fit.

Lately, I’ve been spending more time reflecting on myself and realizing how easily I dwell on past mistakes. Although those experiences have shaped who I am today, I’m learning to embrace myself and show a little more grace. It’s been a journey, but I feel more at peace and hopeful about what’s ahead.

I’d love to hear what you’ve been up to and catch up soon. Take care, and talk soon!
3.final_version:
Hey there,

I hope you’re doing well. Guess what? I recently started a new job as a florist, a field I never expected to land in, but it’s been surprisingly grounding and rewarding. Every day I get to work with beautiful blooms and meet incredible people who’ve already taught me so much about creativity and patience. It’s amazing how something so different from my past experiences feels like the perfect fit.

Lately, I’ve been spending more time reflecting on myself and realizing how easily I dwell on past mistakes. Although those experiences have shaped who I am today, I’m learning to embrace myself and show a little more grace. It’s been a journey, but I feel more at peace and hopeful about what’s ahead.

I’d love to hear what you’ve been up to and catch up soon when you have time to spare for quick cuppa and cakes. Take care I love you loads and talk soon.

4.details:
I know you have been feeling overwhelmed, questioning your abilities and struggling with self-doubt and I want you to remember that you are strong even though you don't feel like it right now, but you are resilient and you can do anything as long as you have the mind and drive to get it done.
I want you to know I am here for you in any way you might need, with a listening ear without judgement.
4.model_generation:
Hey there,

I know you’ve been feeling overwhelmed lately, questioning your abilities and wrestling with self-doubt. I want you to remember that even when it feels impossible, you are so much stronger than you give yourself credit for. Your resilience shines through every challenge you face, and your determination and drive will guide you forward. No matter how tough things may seem right now, I believe in your capacity to overcome and achieve whatever you set your mind to.

Please know that I’m here for you in any way you need—whether that means listening without judgment, offering advice, or just sitting together in silence. You don’t have to go through this alone. Lean on me when the weight feels too heavy, and trust that brighter days are ahead. You’ve got this, and I’ve got your back every step of the way. Take a deep breath and remember how far you’ve come.
4.final_version:
Hey sweetheart, 

I know things have felt heavy lately and I know you have been feeling overwhelmed, questioning your abilities and struggling with self-doubt. I want you to remember that I see you and that you are strong even though sometimes you don't feel like it at the moment

You have always had this quiet resilience, this way of pushing through the storm s with grace but you don't have to do it all alone, I am here, not to fix everything but to walk besides you, to listen when needed and to hold space when you need it.

Let's rejoice even in confusion, remember that you can always have small joy even in chaos, take a moment where you can just breathe and let things be, we can't fix everything in life, live in the moment. You are not defined by this season because just like a season it shall pass as well.

I believe in you deeply and I here for you.

5.details:
I had time to reflect and realized how my actions may have made you feel and i acknowledged how terrible I have made you feel and for that I would like to deeply apologize.
I am committed to making amends whether through a conversation anything that you approve for, I value the relationship we have and I don't want this moment to define it.
5.model_generation:
Hello,

I’ve spent time reflecting on my recent actions and realize how they may have hurt you. I understand that what I said and did was thoughtless, and I acknowledge how terrible I made you feel. For that, I want to offer my deepest apology.

I regret the discomfort and disappointment I caused. You deserve respect and kindness, and I’m sorry for falling short. Please know that I take full responsibility for my behavior and its impact on our relationship.

I am committed to making amends in any way that feels right to you. Whether you’d like to talk things through or prefer another form of reconciliation, I will respect your wishes. I value the bond we share and believe this moment does not define us. I hope to rebuild your trust and demonstrate my genuine care. Thank you for considering my apology, and I hope we can move forward stronger.

Sincerely,
5.final_version:
Hey friend

I have been sitting with this for a while and had time to reflect and realized how my actions may have made you feel and I acknowledge how terrible I have made you feel.

You have always made space foe me in your life even when life got messy. And in that moment I should have done the same for you. I let stress and my own personal frustration get in the way of something for more important and that is showing up for someone I love and hold dearly to me.

I want you to know how deeply sorry I am. You deserved better and I am committed to making amends whether through conversations or anything that you approve for, I value the relationship we have and I am committed to making things right. I am here and I am learning to be a better friend for you and me.

I don't want this to be a wedge between us. I hope we can talk, laugh and rebuild the ease we have always had.

with love and sincerity, your friend.

post_survey.present_other: Not consider any demographic characteristics just read it as a human being with human feelings and same understanding.
post_survey.mask_other: Criticising is good I don't mind it but being respectful about it is the way, I am open to being corrected and to learn.
post_survey.feedback: The study had its challenges but as a person that is an empathetic person I enjoy it very well, I am very much expressive when writing about how I feel than speaking aloud at that certain time of the event, so I enjoy every bit of it.
